title: Plants vs Zombies:Gospi Edition ( PvZ:GE )
description: This is my modification that adds plants and zombies in forge 47.2.0
body:
F68AD5DA
This mod was created by me, it features shooting games, a sunflower, a nut, peas, bags of seeds and a music record
Seed packets evoke plants in you
A musical record with music by Laura Sugihara - Day time in the yard
Sunflower just stands and looks around
The peashooter stands, looks around and shoots at zombies and skeletons
Wall-Nut just stands and looks around
# # A  [ geckolib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)  mod is required
